# MiddelMen

> MiddelMen is a trust infrastructure and verification layer for social commerce. It allows independent sellers on platforms like Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook to build public trust profiles, collect verified reviews, and secure transactions.

## Core Features

- **Shareable Trust Profile**: One unified link-in-bio page containing contact methods (WhatsApp, Email, Phone), verified seller status, and aggregate ratings.
- **Verified Reviews**: Reputation management system where buyers submit ratings and comments linked to verified accounts, reducing fraud and spam.
- **Dispute Resolution**: Dedicated system for buyers and sellers to raise and resolve transaction issues under administrator supervision.
- **Escrow & Payments (Upcoming)**: Secure transactional vault holding buyer funds until successful delivery is mutually confirmed.

## Navigation & Pages

- [Homepage](https://middelmen.com/): Product overview, key benefits, steps to start, and search utility.
- [About MiddelMen](https://middelmen.com/about): Explanation of the trust ecosystem, why social sellers use MiddelMen, frequently asked questions (FAQs), and privacy details.
- [Discover & Search](https://middelmen.com/search): Search engine to look up seller usernames, verify ratings, and check credibility.
- [Terms of Service](https://middelmen.com/terms): Terms and conditions for platform usage, username policies, and review guidelines.

## Crawler Directives

- **API Base**: `/api` (Blocked for indexation, internal sessions only)
- **Dashboard**: `/dashboard` (Private seller panel, blocked for crawling)
- **Sitemap**: [sitemap.xml](https://middelmen.com/sitemap.xml)
